Data - Interface in st.orm

Represents a column discovered from the database metadata.

Represents a foreign key relationship discovered from the database metadata.

Represents a primary key column discovered from the database metadata.

Represents a column that is part of a unique index discovered from the database metadata.

INFORMATION_SCHEMA - Enum constant in enum class st.orm.core.template.SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy
Bulk queries using standard INFORMATION_SCHEMA views (TABLE_CONSTRAINTS, KEY_COLUMN_USAGE, REFERENTIAL_CONSTRAINTS).
INFORMATION_SCHEMA - Enum constant in enum class st.orm.core.template.SqlDialect.SequenceDiscoveryStrategy
Use INFORMATION_SCHEMA.SEQUENCES (H2, PostgreSQL, SQL Server).
INFORMATION_SCHEMA_REFERENCING - Enum constant in enum class st.orm.core.template.SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy
Bulk queries using INFORMATION_SCHEMA views with REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME and REFERENCED_COLUMN_NAME columns in KEY_COLUMN_USAGE for foreign key discovery.
Inline - Annotation Interface in st.orm
Indicates that the underlying fields of the record component are inlined in this record.

Indicates whether the SQL parameters should be inlined directly as literals into the SQL string, or whether bind variables should be used.
inlineParameters() - Element in annotation interface st.orm.SqlLog

ORMTemplate - Interface in st.orm.core.template
The ORMTemplate is the primary interface that extends the QueryTemplate and RepositoryLooking interfaces, providing access to both the SQL Template engine and ORM logic.

The primary entry point for Storm's ORM functionality, combining SQL template query construction with repository access.

Executes the query and returns a Slice of results.

Executes the query and returns a Slice of results.
slice(Metamodel.Key<E, V>, int) - Method in interface st.orm.core.repository.EntityRepository
Returns the first slice of entities ordered by the specified key.
slice(Metamodel.Key<E, V>, int) - Method in interface st.orm.repository.EntityRepository
Returns the first slice of entities ordered by the specified key.

Returns the first slice of entities ordered by a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.

Returns the first slice of entities ordered by a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.

Returns the first slice of projections ordered by the specified key.

slice(Metamodel.Key<P, V>, Metamodel<P, S>, int) - Method in interface st.orm.core.repository.ProjectionRepository

slice(Metamodel.Key<P, V>, Metamodel<P, S>, int) - Method in interface st.orm.repository.ProjectionRepository
Returns the first slice of projections ordered by a non-unique sort column with a unique tiebreaker.
slice(Metamodel.Key<T, E>, int) - Method in class st.orm.core.template.QueryBuilder
Executes the query and returns the first Slice of results, ordered by the specified key in ascending order.
slice(Metamodel.Key<T, E>, int) - Method in class st.orm.template.QueryBuilder
Executes the query and returns the first Slice of results, ordered by the specified key in ascending order.
slice(Metamodel.Key<T, E>, Metamodel<T, S>, int) - Method in class st.orm.core.template.QueryBuilder
Executes the query and returns the first Slice of results for composite keyset pagination, sorting by a non-unique column (sort) with a unique tiebreaker (key) in ascending order.
slice(Metamodel.Key<T, E>, Metamodel<T, S>, int) - Method in class st.orm.template.QueryBuilder
Executes the query and returns the first Slice of results using composite keyset pagination with two columns: a non-unique sort for ordering and a unique key as a tiebreaker.
Slice<R> - Record Class in st.orm
Represents a slice of query results, typically used for keyset-based pagination.
Slice(List<R>, boolean) - Constructor for record class st.orm.Slice
Creates an instance of a Slice record class.

sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<T, E>, E, Metamodel<T, S>, S, int) - Method in class st.orm.template.QueryBuilder

Executes the query and returns the next Slice of results after the specified ref cursor value, ordered by the specified key in ascending order.

Executes the query and returns the next Slice of results after the specified composite cursor with a ref-based unique key, sorting by a non-unique column (sort) with a unique tiebreaker (key) in ascending order.
sliceAfter(Metamodel.Key<T, V>, Ref<V>, Metamodel<T, S>, S, int) - Method in class st.orm.template.QueryBuilder
Executes the query and returns the next Slice of results after the specified composite cursor using two-column keyset pagination with a ref-typed unique key: a non-unique sort for ordering and a unique key as a tiebreaker.

Sql - Interface in st.orm.core.template
Represents the generated SQL statement with parameters.
SqlCompiler - Interface in st.orm.core.template.impl
Represents the SQL result of processing a template element.
SqlDialect - Interface in st.orm.core.template
Represents a specific SQL dialect with methods to determine feature support and handle identifier escaping.
SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy - Enum Class in st.orm.core.template
Strategy for discovering primary keys, unique keys, and foreign keys in the database schema.
SqlDialect.SequenceDiscoveryStrategy - Enum Class in st.orm.core.template
Strategy for discovering sequences in the database schema.
SqlDialectProvider - Interface in st.orm.core.spi
Provides the SQL dialect.
SqlInterceptor - Interface in st.orm.core.template
Interceptor for SQL statement generation events.

Manages SQL interceptors.

SqlLog - Annotation Interface in st.orm
Annotation for capturing and logging SQL statements.
SqlLogInterceptor - Class in st.orm.core.template.impl
Shared utility for processing SqlLog annotations in repository proxies.
SqlOperation - Enum Class in st.orm.core.template
Represents the SQL mode.

Get the SQL template used by this factory.

A template processor for generating SQL queries.

A listener for batch events within a SQL query context.
SqlTemplate.BindVariables - Interface in st.orm.core.template
Manages the binding of variables in a SQL query.
SqlTemplate.NamedParameter - Record Class in st.orm.core.template
Represents a named parameter that can be used in an SQL query.
SqlTemplate.Parameter - Interface in st.orm.core.template
Represents a parameter that can be used in an SQL query.
SqlTemplate.PositionalParameter - Record Class in st.orm.core.template
Represents a positional parameter that can be used in an SQL query.
SqlTemplate.RecordListener - Interface in st.orm.core.template
A listener for record events within a SQL query context.

SubqueryTemplate - Interface in st.orm.core.template
The subquery template is used to construct subqueries that can be linked to the outer query.

Provides factory methods for constructing subqueries that can be correlated with or embedded in an outer query.
